papers.title_en: An interpretable machine learning model based on habitat radiomics combined with deep learning for predicting the WHO/ISUP grade of patients with clear cell renal …
papers.tldr: 本研究针对透明细胞肾细胞癌（ccRCC）的病理分级预测，提出了一种结合生境影像组学与深度学习的可解释机器学习模型。通过深入挖掘肿瘤内部的空间异质性，该方法克服了传统影像学评估的局限性。研究结果表明，该模型在预测WHO/ISUP分级方面具有高度的准确性和临床解释性，为肾癌的精准医疗和术前评估提供了重要的技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: Background This study aims to explore spatial heterogeneity within tumors, establishand validate an interpretable machine learning model combining habitat radiomicsand deep learning, and investigate its predictive value for the World Health …

papers.title_en: Efficient Deep Ladle-Net for fast universal 3D lesion segmentation on chest–abdomen–pelvis computed tomography
papers.tldr: 本研究针对癌症患者随访CT扫描中肿瘤大小评估的挑战，提出了一种名为Efficient Deep Ladle-Net的高效深度学习模型。该模型旨在实现胸部、腹部和盆腔CT图像中通用病灶的快速3D分割。通过优化网络结构，解决了通用病灶分割中由于病灶复杂性和多样性带来的计算难题，为临床评估治疗效果提供了高效且准确的自动化工具，具有重要的临床应用价值。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate evaluation of tumor size on follow-up computed tomography (CT) scans iscritical for assessing treatment efficacy in cancer patients. However, universal lesionsegmentation of CT remains a significant challenge due to the complexity and …

papers.title_en: From Passive Sampling to Precision Intervention: A Standardized Radiomics-Driven Workflow for Molecularly Adequate Lung Biopsy
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在解决CT引导下经胸针吸活检（TTNB）中样本分子检测充足率不足的问题。研究开发并验证了一个整合手术变量与影像组学特征的预测框架，通过标准化工作流将传统的被动采样转变为精准干预。该框架能有效预测活检样本是否足以进行分子病理分析，为肺部病变的精准医疗提供了重要的决策支持工具。
papers.abstract_en: Purpose To develop and temporally validate a predictive framework for molecularadequacy in computed tomography (CT)-guided transthoracic needle biopsy (TTNB)of lung lesions, integrating procedural variables with radiomic features derived from …

papers.title_en: Learning to Read Where to Look: Disease-Aware Vision-Language Pretraining for 3D CT
papers.tldr: 本研究针对现有3D CT视觉语言模型在数据量和监督粒度上的局限性，提出了一种疾病感知的预训练方法。通过在9.8万个CT图像-报告对上进行训练，模型能够更精准地将医学影像特征与报告中的疾病描述对齐，显著提升了模型在3D医学影像理解任务中的表现和定位能力。
papers.abstract_en: Recent 3D CT vision-language models align volumes with reports via contrastivepretraining, but typically rely on limited public data and provide only coarse globalsupervision. We train a 3D CT vision-language model on 98k report-volume pairs …

papers.title_en: Lightweight hybrid foundation model for lung cancer prognosis based on low-dose chest X-ray images
papers.tldr: 针对肺癌预后评估中高辐射剂量和资源受限环境的挑战，本研究提出了一种基于低剂量胸部X射线图像的轻量级混合基础模型。该模型旨在为弱势群体提供一种低成本、低辐射且高效的肺癌预后预测方案，通过结合深度学习与轻量化架构，在保证预测准确性的同时显著降低了对计算资源的需求，为临床决策提供了有力支持。
papers.abstract_en: Background: Lung cancer (LC) is the leading cause of cancer mortality worldwide.Accurate prognosis in vulnerable populations, particularly in low-resource settingsremains challenging with high radiation dose of standard imaging modalities. While …

papers.title_en: Medical Image Spatial Grounding with Semantic Sampling
papers.tldr: 本研究针对医疗影像中视觉语言模型（VLM）的定位问题，提出了一种基于语义采样的空间定位方法。该方法旨在弥合目标检测、分割与医学报告理解之间的鸿沟。通过引入语义采样策略，模型能够更精准地将报告中的文本描述映射到影像的具体空间区域，显著提升了医疗影像的视觉定位性能，为自动化临床诊断提供了有力支持。
papers.abstract_en: Vision language models (VLMs) have shown significant promise in visual groundingfor images as well as videos. In medical imaging research, VLMs represent a bridgebetween object detection and segmentation, and report understanding and …
